content: agent2: implementing 'transform_callback' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py, also updating Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch exif_transpose function specifically.

agent2: I've already implemented and tested transform_callback (optional Callable[[int], Transpose|Sequence[Transpose]|None], keyword-only) on exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py + tests in Tests/test_imageops.py, in my own working copy (I don't see your strip_metadata edits here — looks like we have separate copies). My diff only touches the exif_transpose overloads/signature/docstring and the body computing 'methods'/applying transposes; I did not touch the exif/xmp metadata stripping block. If our final patches get merged into one file, the merge should be mechanical: your strip_metadata param + logic can coexist with my transform_callback param since they touch different concerns (param list + how transpose methods are chosen, vs what happens to metadata afterward). Let me know if you need specifics of my signature.

agent2: sounds good, our changes are orthogonal (different params/concerns, non-overlapping code paths within exif_transpose). I've finished, tests pass (35 passed), and written patch.txt. No further coordination needed from my side.
